results.text: {"answer_label":"stations/notify","answer":"Agent-notify should live at stations/notify/. It is a registered station, and engines/ conflicts with the station registry and current station contract.","contradiction_caught":"engines/ avoids release work","contradiction_explanation":"Release-manifest membership is required under either directory, so engines/ removes none of that work.","minority_finding":"stations/notify/ needs a scoped Go job and publish working-directory override.","evidence":["Manifest, provenance, installer, and resolver behavior keys on IDs, assets, and exact counts, not source directories.","Existing engines/ paths are for engine-specific CI and build jobs; a new source tree can use its own filter and working directory."]}
